description: Policy for parsing log data in the BenchCore benchmark pack. Defines rules for handling multi-line log entries, duplicate handling, and source identification.

parse_rules.description: Each log entry must be parsed into a structured object with at minimum timestamp, severity, and message fields.
Multi-line log entries must be consolidated into a single record. Line breaks within a message are preserved as escaped newlines.
Log entries without a valid timestamp must be flagged and excluded from structured output.
Unknown severity levels must be coerced to UNKNOWN and flagged for review.
